Patch Set 5:

(6 comments)

This patch seems relatively straight forward just reading through it for the first time, though I can't comment on the details of the CLIO code.

I added Bobijam and Shilong to the reviewer list so they are aware of the patch (though for their information this patch is still only a prototype to see if we can get lockless IO working).

Patch Set 5:

Oleg, I think it would be useful to test this together with my patch https://review.whamcloud.com/36587 "LU-12910 osc: allow increasing osc.*.short_io_bytes" (which is now ready for landing, FYI), as that should allow the io500-hard-{read,write} to be embedded directly into the RPC instead of doing a separate bulk RDMA.

You need to set something like:

    lctl set_param osc.*.short_io_bytes=65536

to increase the short IO size from the 16KB default to 64KB.

commit.message:
